title: The Golden Bell Rings
description: The crew and their allies use the Giant Jack and the battlefield itself to get Luffy close enough to stop Enel.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, 19, 20, this scene focuses on Enel, Nami, Aisa, Gan Fall, Luffy. The crew and their allies use the Giant Jack and the battlefield itself to get Luffy close enough to stop Enel.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Yahahaha! Well done in coming here!

summary: The crew and their allies use the Giant Jack and the battlefield itself to get Luffy close enough to stop Enel.
